name: robin-hood-mcp

tools.name: robinhood.scan_text
tools.description: Classify untrusted text for prompt and secret-like risk.

tools.name: robinhood.scan_path
tools.description: Recursively scan a file or directory using ROBIN HOOD ignore rules.

tools.name: robinhood.check_capability
tools.description: Validate a requested capability and optional path.

tools.name: robinhood.budget
tools.description: Estimate token usage against a selected model profile.

tools.name: robinhood.pack
tools.description: Create a compact context bundle under a token budget.

tools.name: robinhood.route
tools.description: Recommend a model/provider path without invoking the model.

tools.name: robinhood.snapshot
tools.description: Snapshot context and estimate changed-only token savings.

tools.name: robinhood.savings
tools.description: Estimate token and cost savings across repeated runs.

tools.name: robinhood.select
tools.description: Select changed files and useful neighboring context under a token budget.

forbidden: invoke models before scan and budget controls are explicitly enabled
